faqs.question: How do I know if I have a clothes moth problem in my New Springville home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include small holes in wool, silk, or cashmere clothing, webbing in closet corners, flying moths near wardrobes, or larvae casings on fabrics. You may also notice adult moths around windows or light fixtures, particularly in bedrooms and storage areas where natural fibers are kept.

faqs.question: What does clothes moth control cost in New Springville?
faqs.answer: Clothes moth control services in New Springville typically range from $550 to $5,000 depending on the extent of the infestation, the size of your home, and the number of treatments required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work, with most single-family homes falling in the $550-$1,500 range for standard treatments.
